title: Take me, Translate! (Mods Russian Translation)
description: Перевод некоторых модов на русский язык.
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f1710b9654f54a0d7ee961bb693deeea2646ca1_0.webp)

Translation of some mods into Russian. Some of them are translated from scratch, some are corrections of the original translation. The resource pack will be constantly improved.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Перевод некоторых модов на русский язык. Некоторые из них переведены с нуля, некоторые являются исправлениями оригинального перевода. Ресурспак будет постоянно улучшаться.

![Ready](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b3592ab3cbb4175da90a151c3aef2ab92948fa5_0.webp)

- Another Furniture
- Basic Weapons
- Better End Island
- Catalogue
- Cold Sweat
- Create: Bells & Whistles
- Create Deco (in work)
- Critters and Companions
- Cultural Delights
- E4MC
- Ecologics
- End's Phantasm
- Farmer's Delight
- Farmer's Respite
- Immersive Weathering
- More Villagers
- Ocean's Delight
- Reinnovation
- Screenshot Viewer
- Sodium
- Sodium Extras
- Sodium Leaf Culling
